summary: Show current approval-stage assignees in the approval chain and document loading-pill contrast plus Xinpin red accent tokens.

notes: No database schema or approval routing changes.
Active approval-chain stage hints now show pending node approver names, for example 当前审批阶段：张三、李四.
Completed assignees in the same node are not shown in the current-stage hint.
Design tokens now include the Xinpin logo red accent and soft/text pair.
Design guidance now forbids low-contrast loading pills where temporary text and pill fill have nearly identical color.

verification: Run npx vite build from frontend with production VITE_* variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.38.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.38.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.38.
known_warnings: Vite still reports large production chunks for existing application bundles.
